name: Jessica's Supper Nachos
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat skillet at medium-high temperature; brown the meat and onions.
2. Drain well in a colander, removing all grease.
3. Return the meat and onions to the skillet; add cumin and mix well.
4. In a large mixing bowl, combine refried beans and taco seasoning mix; blend well.
5. Add grated Monterey Jack cheese to the bean mixture; mix together.
6. Spread the refried beans in a shallow rectangular 9 x 13 pan.
7. Cover the bean mixture with the browned meat and onions.
8. Sprinkle chiles evenly over the meat.
9. Top with grated Cheddar cheese.
10. Pour salsa over the cheese (this can be made ahead and refrigerated; do not freeze).
11. Bake uncovered in a 400 degrees oven for 20 to 25 minutes, or until thoroughly heated.
12. Place tortilla chips around the edge of the meat/beans dish and garnish as desired.
